title: Romantic Glazed Tunisian Squash Tagine
description: A floral and creamy Tunisian dish featuring roasted squash, finished with a sweet and sticky glaze, all wrapped in a lotus leaf for a romantic presentation.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the squash with olive oil, onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, and coriander until the squash is evenly coated.
Spread the squash mixture on a baking sheet and roast for 30 minutes, or until tender.
In a small saucepan, combine honey and rose water, and heat over low heat, stirring until the honey dissolves.
Brush the honey glaze over the roasted squash.
Wrap each serving of squash in a lotus leaf, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Let the tagine rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
